Off Calendar Aug-14-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
David Toy, Esq. of GILLISS VALLA & DALSIN 925/962-9009, for plaintiff 98 Battery Associates, LLC, moving for a preliminary injunction
Kim Rae Mayor, Esq. of MAYOR LAW OFFICES 986-1036, for defendants Front Hardware, Inc., Maria Thrower and Monica Funk, opposing the motion
K. Keith McAllister, Esq., 435-2338, co-counsel for defendants

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court vacated its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF 98 BATTERY ASSOCIATES, LLC, A NEVADA LIMITED LIABI'S Order To Show Cause Regarding Preliminary Injunction PURSUANT TO JUL-18-03 EX-PARTE ORDER -- the Court ordered the temporary restraining order issued previously to remain in effect until 12:00pm, 8/18/03. Temporary restraining order will be subjected to modification. (JLW/301/CW) Reporter: Beldon Yee CSR #2647
